{{Infobox artifact
| name = Penance arrowheads
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ozmanthus]] has prototype arrowheads for [[Penance]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shen]] possesses [[Penance]] arrows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used two [[Penance]] arrows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
